claims.summary: Long unquoted reflection must remain non-artifact content.
claims.disposition: verify dense unquoted and nested text remains semantic after known-token cleanup

claims.summary: Rigid quote-pair recognition could misclassify nested reflection as boundary placement.
claims.disposition: verify quote matching only annotates placement counts and does not discard or rewrite expressive content

claims.summary: Artifact review should retain semantic density and structural-form uncertainty beyond binary quote syntax.
claims.disposition: verify existing remainder-texture and semantic-integrity diagnostics already expose those bounded signals without claiming meaning from form
